items.title: Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services Insufficient Granularity of Access Control Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services contains an insufficient granularity of access control vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

items.title: Microsoft SharePoint Server Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft SharePoint contains a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

items.title: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances Server-Side Request Forgery Vulnerability
items.summary: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances contain a server-side request forgery vulnerability that could allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to potentially cause the appliance to make requests to unintended location.

items.title: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances Code Injection Vulnerability
items.summary: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances contain a code injection vulnerability which in specific conditions could potentially enable a remote authenticated attacker as administrator to execute arbitrary OS commands.

items.title: Balbooa Forms Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type Vulnerability
items.summary: Balbooa Forms contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated arbitrary file upload which could allow uploading of executable files leading to full RCE.

items.title: iCagenda Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type Vulnerability
items.summary: iCagenda contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows the upload of arbitrary files in the file attachment feature, ultimately resulting in PHP code upload and execution.

items.title: JoomShaper SP Page Builder Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type Vulnerability
items.summary: JoomShaper SP Page Builder contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows unauthenticated users to upload arbitrary files, ultimately resulting in the upload and execution of PHP code.

items.title: Langflow Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key Vulnerability
items.summary: Langflow contains an authorization bypass through user-controlled key vulnerability which allows an authenticated attacker to execute any flow belonging to another user by specifying the victim's flow ID in the request.

items.title: Joomlack Page Builder Improper Access Control Vulnerability
items.summary: Joomlack Page Builder contains an improper access control vulnerability that could allow for remote code execution via unauthenticated arbitrary file upload.

items.title: Adobe ColdFusion Path Traversal Vulnerability
items.summary: Adobe ColdFusion contains a path traversal vulnerability that could lead to arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user.

items.title: Microsoft SharePoint Server Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability which allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network.

items.summary: SimpleHelp contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the OIDC authentication flow. When OIDC authentication is configured, identity tokens submitted during login are accepted without verifying their cryptographic signature. In a vu…

items.title: PTC Windchill and FlexPLM Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
items.summary: PTC Windchill and FlexPLM contains an improper input validation vulnerability allowing an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute arbitrary code by sending a malicious request to the network.

items.title: Lantronix EDS5000 Code Injection Vulnerability
items.summary: Lantronix EDS5000 contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow attackers to inject arbitrary OS commands into the username parameter. Injected commands are executed with root privileges.

items.title: Ubiquiti UniFi OS Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
items.summary: Ubiquiti UniFi OS contains an improper input validation vulnerability which could allow a malicious actor with access to the network to conduct command injection.
